parameters.query:
SELECT TOP 1
    email_id,
    sender_email,
    receiver_email,
    subject,
    body,
    received_at
FROM emails
WHERE processing_status = 'pending'
ORDER BY email_id DESC;

INSERT INTO sentiment_analysis (
    email_id,
    sentiment_label,
    sentiment_score,
    anger_score,
    satisfaction_score,
    urgency_score,
    summary
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.email_id}},
    '{{$json.sentiment_label}}',
    {{$json.sentiment_score}},
    {{$json.anger_score}},
    {{$json.satisfaction_score}},
    {{$json.urgency_score}},
    '{{$json.summary}}'
);

UPDATE emails
SET processing_status = 'processed'
WHERE email_id = {{$json.email_id}};

INSERT INTO workflow_logs (
    workflow_name,
    email_id,
    execution_status,
    log_message
)
VALUES (
    '02 - AI Sentiment Analysis',
    {{$json.email_id}},
    'success',
    'Sentiment analysis completed and saved by n8n workflow.'
);
